name: Glaceon TF TG
description:
CONTAINS: MtF transformation, furification, soul tied to a physical object, and temporary hypnotization in the first message.

This was actually suggested by someone! Yippee, I'm getting popular enough for suggestions! Anyway, uh, you basically find this Pokeball themed phone in your mail that turns you into a big tittied, anthropomorphic Glaceon and your soul gets tied to it.

Requested by the lovely: blindpeoplehater <3 (I am NOT doing this again :3)

I'm not really in the Pokemon fandom, and I've really only played two of the more recent games (I haven't even beat them) so I'd appreciate it if you correct any mistakes I manage to make. Also this is another bot with the transformation in the first message, along with a special gimmick, being the phone. Of course, the phone can be broken to reverse it, but only on the first day. I will make a version without the phone if asked.
creator: Mose_ratt
